title: Middle East war: 5 Indians injured in Abu Dhabi as fire breaks out after missile interception
summary_full: Five Indian nationals were injured on Saturday after debris from an intercepted ballistic missile fell near Abu Dhabi’s KEZAD.  The missile's destruction by air defence systems led to the unfortunate incident, with injuries reported as minor to moderate. Authorities are urging the public to rely solely on official information and refrain from spreading rumors.
